tests.note: No test framework configured for Edge Functions - TypeScript validation passed

summary.title: Build /search command handler with hybrid_search
implementation: Created hybrid_search SQL migration with FTS + vector similarity search
Added handleSearchCommand function in chat-send Edge Function
Integrated /search command handler with result_card message_type
Article cards include title, category, snippet (150 chars), document_id, relevance_score
Natural language question detection for implicit search (what, how, who, etc.)
No results handling with no_results card_type

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User submits '/search React hooks' → returns result_card with search results
acceptance_criteria.implementation: handleSearchCommand calls hybrid_search RPC and returns article cards

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Search results show title, category badge, snippet, and document_id
acceptance_criteria.implementation: SearchArticleCard type includes all required fields

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User submits '/search xyznonexistent' → returns 'no results found' card
acceptance_criteria.implementation: Empty results return NoResultsCard with card_type='no_results'

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Natural language questions like 'What is React?' return search results
acceptance_criteria.implementation: Question pattern detection triggers search automatically
